one_time_description: Trans Mountain pipeline revenue of $4,255,467 in 2021 (also $3,865,127 in 2020), appears to be a significant non-recurring or project-based revenue stream
economic_notes: Nation has two business entities accounted for under modified equity method: Shxw'owhamel Ventures Limited Partnership (SVLP) and Shxw'owhamel Ventures GP Ltd. (SVGP). Earnings from equity investments of $1,175,639 in 2021.
notes: Large tangible capital asset purchases of $13,719,601 in 2021 drove net financial position to a deficit of $4,649,377 from a surplus of $9,178,137 in 2020. Long-term debt nearly doubled from $11,298,649 to $23,232,037. Trans Mountain revenue is a significant recurring item. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method excluded from consolidation. Prior year revenue of $29M was unusually high due to $21.4M Government of Canada transfers (likely one-time). Management responsibility letter dated December 10, 2020 predates the fiscal year end of March 31, 2021 which is unusual. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable + interest payable + wages payable + damage deposits + employee deductions payable.
